LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. DEFENDANTS FELTON PETERSON, AND THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. DEFENDANTS FELTON PETERSON AND THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH 10 DAYS TO ANSWER.
